author: y4rr
content:
Closed APPROVE — full-scope CUDA forward + dispatch landed; downstream unblocks verified.

Implementation:
- ferrotorch-core/gpu_dispatch.rs: index_select_dim_f32 + index_select_dim_f64 added to GpuBackend trait (+38 LoC).
- ferrotorch-gpu/backend_impl.rs: both methods implemented (+51 LoC).
- ferrotorch-gpu/kernels.rs: new PTX kernels for f32 + f64 with arbitrary-axis gather (+718 LoC including 6 discriminating tests + cpu_ref_index_select_dim helper).
- ferrotorch-core/grad_fns/indexing.rs: TypeId dispatch on input.is_cuda(); f32/f64 supported, other dtypes return NotImplementedOnCuda (+166 LoC).
- ferrotorch-vision/swin.rs::build_relative_position_bias: CPU fallback REMOVED — now runs end-to-end on table's home device for both forward and backward.
- ferrotorch-data/Cargo.toml + transforms.rs: cuda feature added + RandomHorizontalFlip CUDA verification test.

Verification on RTX 3090:
- 6 new GPU kernel tests pass: f32/f64 basic, dim=0, dim=last, repeated indices, random permutation.
- random_horizontal_flip_preserves_device_for_cuda_input passes (closes Pass 5.B.5 dependency).
- 14/14 Swin lib tests pass (CPU fallback removal didn't regress anything).
- Build + clippy -D warnings clean across all touched crates.

Sabotage probes (2 variants, real GPU output discrimination):
1. Numerical: all-zero indices injected → wrong-data panic (got 0, expected 8); reverted.
2. Structural: swapped outer_u32 / inner_u32 kernel args → wrong-stride panic (got 4, expected 8); reverted.

Closes #1098 (Pass 3 follow-up) and the dependent CUDA path Pass 5.B.5 left open. No follow-ups filed.
